name: Garden Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Best Foods Light or Reduced-Fat Mayonnaise
1 pound Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, grilled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the mayonnaise with the remaining ingredients (low-fat milk, chopped green onions, lemon peel, lemon juice, sugar, and pepper).
2. Toss the vegetables in half of the dressing.
3. Arrange the mixed vegetables on a lettuce-lined platter.
4. Top with sliced grilled chicken.
5. Drizzle any remaining dressing over the salad.
